title: Proper RTL Support in Text Fields
excerpt:

posts.author: ashleymajar (Ashley Majar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, support for RTL is the biggest problem for our organization to move to Monday.
I run another organization that uses Monday in English and it’s perfect, but in the other organization we really need to write items and comments in Hebrew.
We have no problem with the interface being in English, we just need RTL support for fields.
Currently the main issue is that text in Hebrew with English in the middle will flip, a simple fix to thatt will allow our organization to move to Monday.
